company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides AI-powered automated video editing tools, helping content creators save time and produce professional-quality videos effortlessly.

policies.details: No refunds are issued after 7 days from the date of purchase. Refund requests within the first 7 days will be processed within 5-7 business days.
24/7 support is available exclusively for Pro plan subscribers. Basic plan users have access to email support during business hours (9 AM - 6 PM EST, Monday to Friday).
All videos are stored securely in the cloud. Basic plan includes 10GB storage; Pro plan includes unlimited storage.
You can cancel your subscription at any time. Your plan will remain active until the end of the current billing cycle.
AutoStream offers a 3-day free trial on the Pro plan. No credit card required to start your trial.

faq.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faq.answer: AutoStream supports exporting videos optimized for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, and LinkedIn.

faq.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faq.answer: Yes, you can switch between plans at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately; downgrades apply at the next billing cycle.

faq.question: What video formats does AutoStream accept?
faq.answer: AutoStream accepts MP4, MOV, AVI, and MKV files for input. Output is always in optimized MP4 format.

faq.question: Is there a free plan?
faq.answer: There is no permanent free plan, but we offer a 3-day free trial of the Pro plan with no credit card required.
